chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.PN%.0-1161 0f 2023 Date Order with signature of Judse For orders on office objections For hearing of main case 12.12.2023 Mr Irshad Hussain Dharejo, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Niaz Hussain Maitlo, Advocate for Respondent/ University Mr Agha Athar Hussain Pathan, AAG 4و 74 Learned Counsel for the Respondent No 3 has filed schedule of payment which is taken on record and submits that according to schedule the remaining pensionary benefits of the petitioner would be cleared within three months Copy of this schedule has been provided Counsel for the Petitioner who satisfied an٥ seeks disposal of instant petition which is accordingly disposed of in the above terms However default or non payment of said amount to the petitioner would expose violator to the contempt proceedings
